items.quote: Montes jiu-jitsu is supposed to be that [ __ ] good.

items.claim: Loner has improved significantly since his fight against Charles Johnson.
items.quote: I think Lner's now significantly better, too, than when he fought Charles Johnson.

items.claim: Roy Vaugh has a suspect chin.
items.quote: Roy Vaugh's chin is the red flag, right?

items.claim: Marlon Moraes suffered significant physical decline due to the high volume of damage taken in his recent fights.
items.quote: Mar took too much damage against Morab. Dude, he just fell off hard. But also like before then he got knocked out by Rob Fawn. He got knocked out by Sanag and he took a lot of damage.

items.claim: Marlon Moraes had a record of one win and eight losses in his final nine fights.
items.quote: I mean, he finished what? One win, eight losses in his last nine.

items.claim: Max Holloway's volume, cardio, and chin would likely overcome Conor McGregor in a hypothetical 2026 matchup.
items.quote: I think the volume and the cardio and the chin of Max Holloway most likely beat out the side of uh Conor McGregor in 2026.

items.claim: Gandra is a superior fighter who utilizes a blitzing, pressure-heavy style with power striking.
items.quote: I think he's superior. I think Gandra should be good to go. I think Gandra should look good. He'll blitz. He'll pressure. He'll drop bombs.

items.claim: The upcoming matchup favors Robert Whittaker in a significant way.
items.quote: And I think this is a matchup that favors him in a big way.
